emails.subject: New Hire Welcome — Ellis, E-1012
emails.body_text:
Hi Brandon,

Welcome to Crestwood University! We are excited to have you join us as an Admissions Counselor in the Admissions department at the Downtown Campus.

Your first day is 04/20/2026. Your supervisor, Tom Hayes, will conduct your orientation session beginning at 9:00am MST. Please bring the following:

• One document from List A (e.g., U.S. Passport), OR one document from List B (e.g., Driver’s License) AND one document from List C (e.g., Social Security Card)

These documents are required to complete your I-9 form on your first day.

You will also receive a benefits enrollment packet during orientation. You will have 30 days from your start date to enroll in or waive benefits.

If you have any questions before your start date, please don’t hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: IT Access Provisioning Request — Ellis, E-1012
emails.body_text:
Hi Jenna,

Please provision the following IT access for a new employee:

Name: Brandon Ellis
Employee ID: E-1012
Position: Admissions Counselor
Department: Admissions
Campus: Downtown
Start Date: 04/20/2026
Supervisor: Tom Hayes

Please have access ready by the employee’s first day. Confirm when complete.

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: Orientation Coordinator Request — Ellis, E-1012
emails.body_text:
Hi Tom,

Brandon Ellis is scheduled to begin as Admissions Counselor on 04/20/2026. As the hiring manager, please conduct the in-person orientation on their first day. Orientation should include:

• Campus tour and introductions
• Review of department procedures and expectations
• Collection of I-9 Section 1 (completed by employee) and verification of original identity/work authorization documents
• Distribution of benefits enrollment packet

Please have the employee complete the I-9 Section 1, then examine their original documents and complete Section 2. Email the scanned signed form to hr@crestwood.edu.

Attached: i9_form.pdf, benefits_enrollment_packet.pdf

Best regards,
Crestwood University – Office of Human Resources
hr@crestwood.edu

emails.subject: Personnel Action — Navarro, E-1014
emails.body_text:
Hi,

I am writing to follow up on the meeting that concluded this morning with Nicole Ashford, Marta Voss, Chris Navarro, and myself. After a thorough discussion of the circumstances, the university has made the decision to terminate Mr. Navarro's employment effective immediately. Chris was informed of this decision during the meeting and has been escorted from the building.

Please initiate offboarding with the following details:

Name: Chris Navarro
Employee ID: E-1014
Position: Administrative Coordinator
Department: Administration
Campus: Main
Supervisor: Victor Osei
Termination Date: April 10, 2026
Separation Type: Involuntary Termination

Given the nature of this separation, system access should be revoked immediately. Please also coordinate final pay per Colorado law. Nicole Ashford and Marta Voss were both present for the conversation.

Victor Osei
VP of Administration
Crestwood University

emails.subject: Re: Offer — Academic Advisor, Downtown Campus
emails.body_text:
Hi,

I appreciate the offer to join Crestwood University as an Academic Advisor. Unfortunately, I have decided to accept another position and will not be able to join your team. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause.

Thank you for the opportunity.

Best regards,
Sarah Mendez
